data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case explicitly states the need for conversion attribution, yet the prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing this specific requirement. This indicates a clear gap in coverage for the necessary evidence to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
